results.title: Uniserve Announces CEO Gautam Lohia to Speak at BC Tech Member Summit on AI Automation
results.description: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - June 9, 2026) - Uniserve Communications Corporation (TSXV: USS) (the "Company" or "Uniserve"), a Digital Infrastructure Platform enabling mission-critical connectivity, cloud, managed IT, and AI agent driven services for Canadian businesses, is pleased to announce that Gautam Lohia, Chief Executive Officer and Chairman, will be a featured speaker at the BC Tech Member Summit - Deploying AI for Impact, taking place at the Terminal City Club i

results.title: VodafoneThree enters race for TalkTalk customers with takeover bid
results.description: Vodafone has tabled a bid for TalkTalk’s consumer broadband business, joining a crowded auction as the UK’s largest mobile operator pushes into the home internet market. The FTSE 100 telecoms giant has emerged as a late entrant into the sale process, after initially declining to participate, the Financial Times first reported. Sources close to the [...]

results.title: Ottawa, B.C. back NESI with $5.6M
results.description: NORAM Electrolysis Systems (NESI) said it has received $5.6 million in funding to build electrochemical infrastructure for domestic lithium refining. The package [...] The post Ottawa, B.C. back NESI with $5.6M appeared first on Canadian Mining Journal .
